alt: Spectacular close-up of a mandarinfish's face, big watchful eyes, and neon blue facial lines
caption: Their large, prominent eyes are highly adapted for hunting tiny, fast-moving micro-invertebrates in dim twilight waters.
acquisitionNotes: Exquisite close-up of facial morphology and large twilight-adapted eyes. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/1e/Pez_mandar%C3%ADn_%28Synchiropus_splendidus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-24%2C_DD_234.jpg
